name: Hexxaris
short_description: Swipe lines in three ways to clear the board and achieve high-scoring combos!
detailed_description:
Dive into 'Hexxaris', a hexagonal puzzle game that’s all about real-time strategy and excitement.
Swipe lines in three directions to clear the board and score big with awesome combos! It’s fresh, it’s addictive, and it’s fun for everyone.

Whether you’re a puzzle pro or just searching for your next gaming fix, Hexxaris will captivate you.

Prepare to dive deep into the world of Hexxaris and conquer the hexagonal challenge!
